Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to the Gorham Pageant of Bands
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system in the town of Gorham, county of Ontario, to the Gorham Pageant of Bands.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to the Gorham Pageant of Bands
